raw_consumer_statement: Hello so XXXX accused me of fraudulent activity when they were the ones who had constantly sent wrong orders/charged more or didnt listen to my instructions and left me with no way to return my items as they locked me out of my account. On XXXX first I ordered some travel size items as I was going to go on a flight the very next day. I got all my travel items replaced with the full size ones not only could I not afford it I had to trash them at the XXXX XXXX XXXX. I could not even return them as I did not have time. I also let my shopper know I didnt want another item and they still put it in my cart. Now I got charged {$180.00} when it really should have been {$60.00}.
